text.title: Hacker News Launch Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Account karma ≥50 AND product fits HN audience AND demo without auth wall?

branch.when: account_karma >= 50 AND audience_fit == 'developer' AND demo_auth_free == true
